headline: China wants Trump to embrace its vision of peace for Taiwan
description: Beijing has made the island its top priority, hoping to convince US President Donald Trump, who is visiting China from May 13 to 15, to shift his stance on Taiwan's independence and hold back on selling arms to the island nation.

United Kingdom local elections: 'The entire party system has yet to recover from the fractures caused by Brexit'
description: After the Labour Party's failure in the local elections on May 7, it is time for the party to consider policies addressing territorial, economic and social inequalities, argues political scientist Florence Faucher in an op-ed for Le Monde.

headline: Obesity surges in low-income countries, stabilizes in wealthier nations
description: A major study on global obesity trends, published Wednesday in Nature, reveals diverging trajectories depending on a country's income level. Obesity, however, has reached alarming heights worldwide, affecting one in eight people.

headline: PSG clinch fifth straight Ligue 1 title
description: The reigning European champions will play Arsenal in this season's Champions League final on May 30.

headline: Massoumeh Lahidji, the polyglot watching over the Cannes Film Festival
description: The Iranian interpreter, a pillar of the festival, translates without notes and collaborates with numerous filmmakers.

'Zinédine Zidane maintains a political and social awareness that is deeply connected to his own story'
description: The sociologist Stéphane Beaud explored in an essay the football player's career, framing it within that of the descendants of Algerian immigrants. In an interview, he explains that the athlete tried to make up for the injustices suffered by his father, who remained at the bottom of the social ladder throughout his life.

headline: Wine consumption continues to decline around the world
description: Wine consumption fell by 2.7% year-on-year, according to data released on Tuesday by the International Organization of Vine and Wine. But France remains the world's leading wine exporter by value.

headline: Hantavirus: How great is the transmission risk, as each country sets its own quarantine rules?
description: All passengers from the MV Hondius have now been repatriated to their countries of origin. This marks a critical phase, as follow-up and quarantine protocols are not standardized across borders.
